body.body: Decisions: D156-D164. Gaps closed: #248 response routing, T-trails-infra, T-db-spreading-activation, Chrome headless, Chrome employer profile, watch habits context_inject, proactive scheduler confirmed live. New gaps: T-memory-sync (#293 L-size needs plan), T-test-debt-tooling, #248 needs live verification. Session theme: DB + cognition + Chrome fixes + distributed memory design. Subsystems touched: cortex.py, basal_ganglia.py, thalamus.py, browser.py, push_sources.py (confirmed), 5 PROC_WATCH habits in Postgres.
body.title: day-close steps for session 2026-03-20b (extended)
